title: Binance Cascade/Regime Scientific Collaboration 4
thesis: Detect fragile market states and liquidation cascades early enough to survive and exploit dislocations. This variant fuses statistical physics researcher guidance with network/epidemiology researcher, signal processing/neuroscience researcher to test phase-transition detection and cascade susceptibility before dislocations accelerate; contagion paths, information spread, and lag propagation across correlated books; multi-timescale filtering, burst detection, and low-latency state transitions.
guardrails: No live promotion without human approval.
No credentials or hard caps may be mutated.
